title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0718
summary: 1 Appellants brought a declaratory judgment action in the Supreme Court of New York, Kings County, praying that § 12—a of the Civil Service Law, McK. 7,1 as implemented by the so-called Feinberg Law,2 be declared unconstitutional, and that action by the Board of Education of the City of New York ...
